title: Panchang Element Derivation Model
purpose: Define derivation rules for Tithi, Nakshatra and Yoga from internal astronomical values.

tithi.boundary_rule: Tithi changes when Moon-Sun angular difference crosses multiples of 12 degrees.

nakshatra.boundary_rule: Nakshatra changes when sidereal Moon longitude crosses 13°20′ segments.

yoga.boundary_rule: Yoga changes when combined sidereal Sun+Moon longitude crosses 13°20′ segments.
